name: HWM_CHANGE_EVENT_SET
description: The table stores metadata about event change sets, which represent a collection of changes made to specific objects (e.g., Absence, Assignment) within a particular time frame. This table tracks the processing of these change sets, including the status, consumer information, and relevant timestamps.

columns.Name: CHANGE_EVENT_SET_ID
columns.Comments: A unique identifier of change event set

columns.Name: PUBLISH_START_DATE_TIME
columns.Comments: Event feed poll start date time

columns.Name: PUBLISH_END_DATE_TIME
columns.Comments: Event feed poll end date time

columns.Name: CONSUMER_CODE
columns.Comments: Object which listens to the change events or subscriber of the change events

columns.Name: CONSUMER_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments:
Field indicating the ID of the consumer process that performed the feed event
poll.

columns.Name: JOB_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Request Id of the ess job

columns.Name: FEED_ENTRIES_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of feed entries read from the underlying feed

columns.Name: UPDATED_INSTANT
columns.Comments: The last time the underlying feed or one of its entries was modified

columns.Name: LATEST_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether this is the latest change set for the consumer code.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
